title: Quarterly Support Review
description: Team leads review active support trends, repeat incidents, and staffing needs for the next quarter.

title: Security Training Refresh
description: Annual refresher on password hygiene, phishing awareness, and secure handling of employee records.

title: Payroll Cutoff
description: Final deadline for managers to approve hours and reimbursements before payroll is processed.

title: Memorial Day Office Closure
description: University offices are closed in observance of the holiday. Essential support coverage remains on call.
